diagrams.title: TCP Congestion Window Growth Phases
diagrams.description: Shows how cwnd evolves through Slow Start and Congestion Avoidance phases over time
diagrams.purpose: Understand the dynamics of TCP cwnd growth and phase transitions

diagrams.title: RED Algorithm Drop Probability
diagrams.description: Graph showing packet drop probability as a function of average queue length
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how RED decides when and how aggressively to drop packets

diagrams.title: Token Bucket Operation
diagrams.description: Diagram showing token bucket mechanism for traffic policing
diagrams.purpose: Understand how Token Bucket allows bursts while enforcing rate limits

diagrams.title: Leaky Bucket Operation
diagrams.description: Diagram showing leaky bucket for traffic smoothing
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how Leaky Bucket converts variable input to constant output rate

diagrams.title: AIMD Sawtooth Pattern
diagrams.description: Shows the classic Additive Increase Multiplicative Decrease behavior of TCP over time
diagrams.purpose: Understand the fundamental AIMD principle and network stability
